case_title: 3RD SYLVAN, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY VS. JIAN WEN LI et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT LI, JIAN WEN INVIDIVIDUALLY AND DBA ZONE 88 CHINESE CUISINE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF 3RD SYLVAN, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LI, JIAN WEN INVIDIVIDUALLY AND DBA ZONE 88 CHINESE CUISINE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2428 SAN BRUNO AVENUE, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94134, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
